title: Smelt Concrete
description: Smelt Concrete Powder into Concrete, or use a Blast Furnace for extra speed!
body:
![SMELT CONCRETE Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/590325beb8b3f25a8d9b5874a4fc2b88bb5cd757.png)

**Smelt Concrete Powder into Concrete, or use a Blast Furnace for extra speed!**

Available for ALL Minecraft versions.
